### Original Description
An Open Redirect vulnerability in the go-chi/chi >=5.2.2 RedirectSlashes function allows remote attackers to redirect victim users to malicious websites using the legitimate website domain.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4h76-926q-wxxw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T13:01:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4h76-926q-wxxw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4h76-926q-wxxw"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-02-19T17:24:39Z", "published_at": "2026-02-19T18:31:54Z", "references": ["https://github.com/go-chi/chi/security/advisories/GHSA-mqqf-5wvp-8fh8", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-69725", "http://go-chichi.com", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4h76-926q-wxxw"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: chi has an open redirect vulnerability in the RedirectSlashes middleware", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T13:01:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4h76-926q-wxxw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.2.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/go-chi/chi/v5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.2.2, < 5.2.4"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T13:01:47Z"}
